mentions.note: Storage maker crushing earnings on AI data center buildout; despite bear bubble rhetoric, fundamentally sound with multi-billion shareholder returns.

Storage/data company benefiting from data center build-out and memory shortage.
Storage shortage driving explosive EPS growth ($8.10→$15→$26→$38 FY2026-2028); can raise prices with impunity; galloping due to AI data center build-out.
YoY +708% return; storage beneficiary; individual stock opportunity outsizes index returns.
Storage supplier reported terrific quarter but stock parabolic; Cramer favors exiting on overextension.
Rallied 11% on conference call; can't make disk drives fast enough. No capacity to expand production—exactly what market wants in shortage environment.
